Class TerminatedBlock

java.lang.Object
dev.dejvokep.boostedyaml.block.Block<Object>
dev.dejvokep.boostedyaml.block.implementation.TerminatedBlock
public class TerminatedBlock extends Block<Object>
Represents one YAML terminated (does not contain sub-blocks like sections) Block (key=value pair).

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    TerminatedBlock(Block<?> previous, Object value)
    Creates a mapping with the same comments as the provided previous block, with the given value.
    TerminatedBlock(org.snakeyaml.engine.v2.nodes.Node keyNode, org.snakeyaml.engine.v2.nodes.Node valueNode, Object value)
    Creates a mapping using the given parameters; while storing references to comments from the given nodes.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    isSection()
    Returns if this block represents a section.

    Methods inherited from class Block

    addComment, addComments, getComments, getStoredValue, init, isIgnored, removeComments, setComments, setIgnored, setValue

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Constructor Details

    • TerminatedBlock

      public TerminatedBlock(@Nullable org.snakeyaml.engine.v2.nodes.Node keyNode, @Nullable org.snakeyaml.engine.v2.nodes.Node valueNode, @Nullable Object value)
      Creates a mapping using the given parameters; while storing references to comments from the given nodes.
      Parameters:
      keyNode - key node of the mapping
      valueNode - value node of the mapping
      value - the value to store

    • TerminatedBlock

      public TerminatedBlock(@Nullable Block<?> previous, @Nullable Object value)
      Creates a mapping with the same comments as the provided previous block, with the given value. If given block is null, creates a mapping with no comments.
      Parameters:
      previous - the previous block to reference comments from
      value - the value to store

  • Method Details

    • isSection

      public boolean isSection()
      Description copied from class: Block
      Returns if this block represents a section.
      Specified by:
      isSection in class Block<Object>
      Returns:
      if this block represents a section
